final:
module deadbeat_controller(  
    input clk,  
    input reset,  
    input [1:0] input_val,  
    output reg [1:0] output_val  
);  

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
    if (reset) begin  
        output_val <= 2'b00;  
    end else begin  
        output_val <= input_val;  
    end  
end  
endmodule
